packageRules.description: Group all GitHub Actions bumps into one PR.
Group all pre-commit hook bumps into one PR. Covers pre-commit-hooks, reuse-tool, shellcheck-py, cmake-format-precommit in .pre-commit-config.yaml.

Pin kdeneon/plasma by digest. The image is the only mainstream source of working Qt6.7+/KF6/plasma-workspace/qt6-webengine-dev; the CI workflow explicitly tracks it by sha256 to keep upstream image churn from silently breaking builds. Renovate auto-PRs digest bumps so we don't have to run the docker inspect dance by hand.
Major bumps require manual review — surface as checkboxes on the Dependency Dashboard, do not open the PR automatically, do not auto-merge. Minor/patch still flow through automerge gated by CI.
